title: Stuff N' Stuff
description: A datapack that adds more foods and drinks to the game.
body:
Stuff N' Stuff is a datapack focused on bringing more foods and drinks to the game in a vanilla-friendly way.

To get started, make a recipe book by putting a normal book into a crafting grid. After that, you can setup everything you need for the datapack to start making drinks and foods.

Full list of foods and drinks:
 - Sandwich
 - Carrot Cake
 - Golden Carrot Cake
 - Sushi
 - Meatloaf
 - Pizza
 - Honeycomb Pizza
 - Chicken Wings
 - Salad
 - Omelet
 - Ancient Omelet
 - Chicken Pot Pie
 - Ice Cream
 - Taffy (All Colors)
 - Chocolate Cake
 - Tea
 - Coffee
 - Apple Juice
 - Golden Apple Juice
 - Soda
 - Milkshake
 - Melon Smoothie
 - Chocolate Milk



(Yes, I know you can get infinite bottles and no I will not fix it.)
